title: hephaestus-coverage-hc01-medium
prompt: PRESERVE from the reference image — the same industrial automaton workshop, the same bearded robed figure (Hephaestus), the same long assembly line of gold humanoid automata, the same cool blue/purple lighting and concept-art rendering. Render the SAME scene from a NEW camera angle; do not copy the establishing composition: Medium shot of the bearded robed figure (Hephaestus) at the assembly line, inspecting a half-built gold automaton beside him.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Match the exact art style, palette, color, rendering technique, line quality, and medium of the reference image — reproduce its look precisely. Do not introduce any style not present in the reference.
